title: LINN-BENTON-LINCOLN COUNTY HOME REPAIR PROGRAM - 211info
text: DEVNW CORVALLIS LINN-BENTON-LINCOLN COUNTY HOME REPAIR PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers loans which may be used to restore homes to safe conditions, repair or replace items to reduce maintenance and operating costs, adapt homes for accessibility, upgrade exterior appearances, pay loan recording fees or title insurance, and pay for lead paint, asbestos, or mold inspections. 2525 SE Third Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Low-income homeowners who meet ALL of the following requirements: -Currently live in the home -Have homeowner's insurance -Not owe on an outstanding mortgage or property taxes Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm by appointment only Email (541) 752-7220 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 752-7220 Main phone Corvallis (541) 752-5037 FAX Main phone (541) 752-7220 Corvallis Corvallis Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by service. Loans have 0% interest and no monthly payments. DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties (excluding Cities of Corvallis, Gates, and Idanha) SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the second floor at the corner of 3rd Street and SW Madison Avenue. Services: Home Barrier Removal Loans Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services Home Rehabilitation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - COMMUNITY LENDINGWORKS COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE RENTALS HOUSING/SHELTER - DOWN PAYMENT ASSISTANCE MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES MONEY MANAGEMENT - FORECLOSURE AVOIDANCE AND EVICTION PREVENTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DEVNW CORVALLIS
